name: Smart Timer Pro
description: Adaptive Pomodoro timer that learns your peak focus hours and adjusts session lengths automatically.

name: AI Task Prioritizer
description: Let the AI rank your to-do list by deadline, complexity, and long-term impact so you always work on what matters most.

name: Deep Focus Analytics
description: Visualize your productivity streaks, peak hours, and distraction patterns with lifetime analytics history.

name: Team Workspace
description: Shared workspace for up to 10 team members with a unified analytics dashboard and admin controls.

name: Dark Mode Theme
description: Reduce eye strain during late-night sessions with a beautifully crafted dark mode interface.

name: Focus Sounds Pack
description: Curated ambient soundscapes—rain, café, white noise—scientifically paired with focus sessions for deep work.

name: Daily Digest Report
description: Automated daily summaries of completed tasks, focus time, and recommendations for tomorrow's priorities.

name: Distraction Blocker
description: Block distracting websites and apps during active focus sessions so nothing pulls you out of flow state.

name: Goal Tracker
description: Set weekly and monthly goals, track your progress over time, and celebrate milestones to stay motivated.

name: Mobile App (iOS/Android)
description: Take FocusFlow anywhere. Full feature parity with the desktop app, synced across all your devices in real time.
